monitor.capture_what: The full URL argument passed to the HTTP request sink at line 252

oracle_check.condition_description: The URL passed to the HTTP request sink is fully controlled by the user-supplied image_file parameter, pointing to internal/arbitrary hosts (SSRF confirmed when scheme+host in URL matches internal or attacker-controlled destinations)
oracle_check.raise_message_template: PY/FULL-SSRF: Full URL controlled by user-supplied image_file reached HTTP request sink — captured={captured} pattern={matched_pattern}

fuzz_guidance.skip_condition: not (isinstance(image_file, str) and (image_file.startswith('http://') or image_file.startswith('https://') or image_file.startswith('file://')))
